name: codeabyss-ai-ide
description: CodeAbyss: zero-budget browser AI Cloud IDE and autonomous coding agent platform.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,node,python -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w services/api-node" "python -m uvicorn main:app --app-dir services/api-python --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8788 --reload --reload-dir services/api-python"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w services/api-node
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w services/api-node
scripts.start: concurrently -n web,node -c cyan,magenta "npm run start -w apps/web" "npm run start -w services/api-node"
